content.title: Non-Authority Warning
content.body: This roadmap tracks true product decisions. It does not decide product intent without user confirmation.

content.title: Ordered Steps
body: 2. Separate discoverable facts from true human intent.
3. Provide recommended default, alternatives, confidence, and consequence.
4. Record user confirmation, correction, deferral, or rejection.
5. Route confirmed decision back to governing App Behavior authority.

content.title: Review Before Moving Forward
body: Each phase or meaningful subphase should populate `review_before_moving_forward` before moving on.
- standard_review: use the ordered review ladder from `agent/core-workflows.doc.json`.
- specific_review: active workstream docs, governing specs, source evidence, or local artifacts for this roadmap.
- stop_condition: what must be true before the next phase or subphase begins.
